title: Add cli.ts routing for delete_loosefruit_duplicates operation
description: Extend cli.ts to route operation='delete_loosefruit_duplicates' to runDeleteLoosefruit from delete-loosefruit-runner.ts. Follows same pattern as existing delete_duplicates routing. Read the existing import and routing pattern, then add loosefruit case.

files.change: Add 1 new import and 1 new case branch. No existing code modified.

steps.action: Read runner/src/cli.ts to find: (a) existing import for delete-duplicates-runner.ts and runDeleteDuplicates, (b) the switch/case block that routes by payload.operation, (c) how the delete_duplicates case builds the session and calls runDeleteDuplicates.
steps.verification: Import pattern and routing structure identified

steps.action: Add import for LoosefruitDeletePayload and runDeleteLoosefruit from delete-loosefruit-runner.ts.

Add case 'delete_loosefruit_duplicates': in the operation routing switch. Extract targets: LoosefruitTarget[] from payload.targets. Build BrowserSession (reuse session_or_new()). Call runDeleteLoosefruit(session, { targets, dry_run: payload.dry_run ?? true, emit }). Handle errors with try/catch.
steps.verification: Case added and routes to runDeleteLoosefruit with correct payload

criteria: Targets extracted from payload.targets as LoosefruitTarget[]
runDeleteLoosefruit called with session, targets, dry_run, emit
